nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Do not schedule at an interval shorter than 15 minutes (SECURITY.md rate limiting).

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires when n8n itself throws during workflow execution (e.g. HTTP timeout, node crash). Routes to Log Workflow Error so evidenceLogWriter.js records a failed entry in output_log.json.

assignments.name: query
assignments.value: What are the latest trends in AI infrastructure investment?

nodes.name: Set Research Query
nodes.notes: Edit the 'query' value here to change the research question before running. This node merges both trigger paths into a single configurable entry point.

nodes.name: POST /query — Run Pipeline
nodes.notes: Sends the research query to the Node.js pipeline. Set PIPELINE_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n Variables to your Render URL (e.g. https://your-app.onrender.com) or ngrok tunnel for local dev. The pipeline authenticates to Groq and Tavily via its own environment variables — no credentials are stored here.

nodes.name: Check Response Status
nodes.notes: TRUE path: pipeline returned a final_answer → Format Success Output. FALSE path: pipeline returned an error or empty answer → Log Failed Response.

nodes.name: Format Success Output
nodes.notes: Pipeline completed successfully. Use run_id to look up the full evidence log entry in output_log.json (includes context_kept, context_dropped, token_usage, retrieval_quality).

nodes.name: Log Failed Response
nodes.notes: The Node.js pipeline has already written a failed entry to output_log.json with status: 'failed'. Check the Render or local process logs for the root cause.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: '__workflow_error__: ' + ($json.execution?.error?.message || 'Unknown n8n workflow error') + ' | node: ' + ($json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted || 'unknown') + ' | workflow_id: ' + $workflow.id }) }}

nodes.name: Log Workflow Error to Pipeline
nodes.notes: Posts an error-prefixed query to the pipeline so evidenceLogWriter.js writes a status: 'failed' entry to output_log.json. This satisfies the CLAUDE.md Step 15 requirement for error trigger logging.

meta.notes:
Import into n8n cloud free tier. Before running: set the n8n Variable PIPELINE_WEBHOOK_URL to your deployed pipeline URL (Render or ngrok). The Groq and Tavily API keys are managed by the Node.js pipeline via its own environment variables — do not add them here. See README.md for full setup instructions.

Workflow structure:
  Manual Trigger ──┐
                   ├──> Set Research Query ──> POST /query ──> Check Response ──> [TRUE]  Format Success Output
  Schedule Trigger ─┘                                                            └──> [FALSE] Log Failed Response
  Error Trigger ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────> Log Workflow Error to Pipeline
